expected.subject: Cancellation received — site offline today + £18 refund
expected.body:
Hi Sam,

Confirming your cancellation request.

When it takes effect: 2026-05-24

Your site goes offline today. We are processing the
refund to the card on file — usually visible in your
statement within 5-10 working days.

Money side:
  • Prorated refund of £18 — that is the unused
    portion of this month's monthly subscription.
  • The one-off setup fee is NOT refunded — that paid for
    building your site, which has already been delivered.
    Only the monthly subscription is prorated.

Changed your mind? Reply to this email any time before
2026-05-24 and I can undo it on the spot. After that
the site is offline and the account is closed.

Thank you for the run — happy to chat any time if there is
anything I can do to help.

— ModuForge
